title: audit — scheduled tasks
description: Four scheduled entries: per-tenant retention purge nightly, retention-override expiry sweep nightly, hot-to-cold archive migration weekly, monthly regulator compliance report.

entries.name: purge-expired-audits
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:00 UTC per tenant. Runs PurgeExpiredAuditsJob: reads active AuditRetentionPolicy (fallback config default 7y), computes cutoff, hard-deletes rows past cutoff (batched to control lock duration), writes meta-audit summary row. Fires AuditPurgeExecuted per tenant. Accumulates into weekly digest notification (Sunday).

entries.name: expire-retention-overrides
entries.purpose: Nightly 04:00 UTC. Scans AuditRetentionPolicy rows where override_ends_at <= now(). Soft-deletes them + fires AuditRetentionExtensionExpired. Also fires AuditRetentionExtensionExpiringSoonNotification for policies expiring within 30 days (config.audit.retention.expiring_soon_warning_days).

entries.name: export-audits-to-archive
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 05:00 UTC. Enterprise tenants only (implicit via advanced tier). Writes audit rows past 90d hot-window to jsonl.gz in AUDIT_ARCHIVE_S3_BUCKET. Prunes hot table after HEAD-verified upload.

entries.name: generate-monthly-compliance-report
entries.purpose: Monthly on the 1st of each month at 06:00 UTC. Per Enterprise tenant with audit_regulator_export entitlement. Produces regulator-shaped export (jsonl + signed manifest). Uploads to archive bucket with S3 object-lock (compliance mode). Fires AuditExportReadyNotification to compliance officers.
